Holy FUCK episodes 3 and 4???? I'm gonna cry. I'm actually gonna cry. Also, should I maybe not have made the pfp that and/or added Vincent in the bot name?? It's not really, like, a CRAZY spoiler but... I still don't want to spoil stuff. I've been through that before, it sucks TvT

Anyway, gonna go listen to the reprise of Don't You Forget for the millionth time ^^

(Btw, I made his real name in this Vincent, but he prefers Vox so. Yeah. Be nice to him.)
